results.rendered_html:
abhyāroha (von ruh mit abhi + ā) m.
1〉 das Hinaufsteigen: śreyānvā eṣo 'bhyārohādbhavati ko hyevamarhatyabhyāroḍhum  ŚAT. BR. 3,3,4,9 . anabhyārohāya 7,3,2,2 . Uebertr.: athātaḥ pavamānānāmevābhyārohaḥ das Ersteigen, das Beten der drei reinigenden Sprüche (asato mā sadgamaya, tamaso mā jyotirgamaya, mṛtyormāmṛtaṃ gamaya) 14,4,1,30 . =  BṚH. ĀR. UP. 1,3,28 .  DVIVEDAG. : asya ca japakarmaṇo 'bhyāroha ityākhyā . ābhimukhyenārohatyanena japakarmaṇā evaṃviddevabhāvamityabhyārohaḥ . eben so  ŚAṂK. _zu_ BṚH. ĀR. UP. 
— 2〉 Zunahme (Gegens. nivāha): ahnām  ŚAT. BR. 12,2,3,10 .
